@graph.rdfs:label: growth stage
@graph.rdfs:comment: Plant phenological development stages described by the BBCH-scale. BBCH-scales have been developed for a range of crop species where similar growth stages of each plant are given the same code (doi:10.1111/j.1744-7348.1991.tb04895.x)

@graph.rdfs:label: overall stature
@graph.rdfs:comment: Overall plant phenotype meeting breeding objectives, e.g., compact, enhanced branching, determinate, indeterminate, etc

@graph.rdfs:comment: Fungal gnats leaf damage determined by severity scale

@graph.rdfs:label: leaf colour
@graph.rdfs:comment: A leaf morphology trait which is the color of a leaf

@graph.rdfs:label: leaf colour gradient
@graph.rdfs:comment: Leaf colour differences between young mature and old leaves as indicators of leaf senescence

@graph.rdfs:label: nitrogen deficiency
@graph.rdfs:comment: Plant species specific leaf symptoms that indicate nitrogen deficiency

@graph.rdfs:label: phosphorus deficiency
@graph.rdfs:comment: Plant species specific leaf symptoms that indicate phosphorus deficiency

@graph.rdfs:label: phosphorus toxicity
@graph.rdfs:comment: Plant species specific leaf symptoms that indicate excess supply of phosphate

@graph.rdfs:label: plant height
@graph.rdfs:comment: A whole plant morphology trait which is the height of a whole plant

@graph.rdfs:label: average branch length
@graph.rdfs:comment: Average branch length of all branches of a plant

@graph.rdfs:label: canopy diameter
@graph.rdfs:comment: Maximal canopy width as extension of longest branches

@graph.rdfs:label: steam diameter
@graph.rdfs:comment: A stem morphology trait  which is the diameter of a stem. Refer to diameter: A length quality which is equal to the length of any straight line segment that passes through the center of a circle and whose endpoints are on the circular boundary.

@graph.rdfs:label: shoot axis internode length
@graph.rdfs:comment: A shoot axis internode morphology trait which is the length of a shoot axis internode

@graph.rdfs:label: internode count
@graph.rdfs:comment: Internode count using cotyledon node as 0, then counting subsequent nodes up the mainstem to the tip

@graph.rdfs:label: shoot primary branch count
@graph.rdfs:comment: Branch count along the primary shoot axis, counting all nodes along the main stem from the base towards its tip

@graph.rdfs:label: shoot secondary branch count
@graph.rdfs:comment: Secondary branch count (or count of secondary branches) using intersect of the oldest (or lowest) branch with main stem as 0, then counting subsequent nodes along that branch towards its tip

@graph.rdfs:label: leaf number
@graph.rdfs:comment: Average leaf count on a number of representative branches

@graph.rdfs:label: flower number trait
@graph.rdfs:comment: An inflorescence morphology trait which is the number of flowers

@graph.rdfs:label: ripe fruit count
@graph.rdfs:comment: A simple fruit or compound fruit number that is in the fruit ripe stage

@graph.rdfs:label: unripe fruit count
@graph.rdfs:comment: A simple fruit or compound fruit number that is in the fruit unripe stage

@graph.rdfs:label: harvest weight
@graph.rdfs:comment: Harvest dry weight of branch, leaf, stem, root, tertiary / fine root, secondary / lateral_root, tap root / primary root, oldest_internode / stem section, mature_internode / stem section, youngest_internode / stem section, senescing_leaf, oldest_leaf, mature_leaf, young_leaf, leaf_meristem, flower_meristem, young_inflorescence, developing_inflorescence, mature_inflorescence, terminal_inflorescence, fruit, unripe fruit, ripe/fully mature fruit, trichome, male_inflorescence, young_leaf_disc, mature_leaf_disc, old_leaf_disc

@graph.rdfs:label: root density
@graph.rdfs:comment: A qualitative root system classification
